dataset.source: v4 T5 sampled (T=0.8, top_p=0.9, num_samples=4) + polarity-parity verifier filter on each candidate

note_on_early_kill: v11 contrastive pretrain was killed by an external signal at ~epoch 4 of 10. The saved pytorch_model.bin and tokenizer files are complete; the all_results.json was not written but tensorboard event files show the eval trajectory above. Downstream uses this epoch-4 checkpoint.
conclusion: Generator-verifier filtering recovers some of the diversity benefit (LogiQA 29.3 -> 32.3 vs v9) but cannot close the gap to v5/v6. The polarity-parity verifier passes 92.9% of sampled candidates but does not catch semantic errors beyond polarity (wrong subject, scope, predicate). All three diversity mitigations (v8 dn-readd, v10 v5+v6 concat, v9 sampled, v11 sampled+verifier) fail; the v4 T5 polarity-cleaning and surface diversity are structurally coupled.
